name: ANSSI AD Control Paths
description: Imports the output of ANSSI's AD Control Paths (github.com/ANSSI-FR/AD-control-paths) — analysis of Active Directory access-control relationships that reveal hidden privilege-escalation / takeover paths to high-value objects (Domain Admins, the domain root, etc.). Pass a relationship CSV exported by the tooling (a `*.csv` of source -> target via a control right). Each AD object becomes an ASSET (tagged ad/identity) and each control relationship becomes a VULN finding (an identity attack path) on the target object. Read-only (no DB access in run.py).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to an AD-control-paths relationship CSV (columns auto-detected: source/target/right).
